---
title: "About"
comments: false
format:
  html:
    toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/sheafofthoughts/sheafofthoughtsblog
---

I am a master's student in mathematics, mostly interested in algebraic stuff.
In this blog I share things that I find interesting.

I write as a student who is still learning, and these posts are a way to collect something about what I study and to share it with others.

## Notes


  - **Note on sources:** most of the mathematical content on this blog is expository. The proofs and arguments are usually drawn from lectures, textbooks, papers, or from my own notes and memory of them. I do not claim originality for standard results or proofs unless this is explicitly stated. Even when a precise source is not cited line by line, the material should be understood in that spirit.

  - Everything here is written in my free time, so there may be occasional errors. If you notice something unclear, feel free to open an issue on GitHub.
